---
title: "Trial Registration"
---

The LightSPAN pilot study and randomised controlled trial are registered with the **ISRCTN registry**, an international clinical trial registry that ensures transparency and accessibility of study protocols.

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### LightSPAN Pilot Study

**Registry:** ISRCTN  
**Study ID:** ISRCTN41405941  

[View trial registration](https://www.isrctn.com/ISRCTN41405941)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### LightSPAN Randomised Controlled Trial

**Registry:** ISRCTN  
**Study ID:** ISRCTN12391932  

[View trial registration](https://www.isrctn.com/ISRCTN12391932)
:::

:::
